name: The Alternate
description:
CW: FACESITTING AND SMOTHERING

Man, I don't have any ideas to make... I got some suggested bots I should do, but my brain is still flooded with more ideas. Oh, make a Ciph bot for C.AI, oh update Céline already, oh do Pipis for god's sake. You know what? Let me explore the unfinished folder... Ah. I remember this bot. Back in 2024, I made this Alternate bot... But I kept it private... Hey, let me talk about a story of how I started to make facesitting bots, and how you won't have the GRIMKid you know if I never made facesitting bots.

Back in March 2024, I discovered this Miss Circle art in R34. I made it, but kept it private, cause this is where I wasn't ready to be a NSFW bot creator until I dropped Enderwoman. However, when I went exploring on DeviantArt, I discovered... Lamentlife. Yeah, this was when Lamentlife wasn't very popular back then. But, this Zombcat pic... And, I made my first public facesitting bot. If I had never made that private Miss Circle bot, I wouldn't have gotten interested in the Zombcat, and the Monstercat Mommies would never have been made. Oh, and as for the Alternate, I discovered it from Rule 34 as well... Yeah, same thing; when Mermio wasn't very popular as well.

Anyway, I think it's time to release him since 5/28/2024. I'm keeping the original version private and instead releasing the remake version to the public.

Now to the yappin, again, like the original: You broke into a small storage room, while a CCTV camera in the corner records your move. You spot a table with a bunch of VHS tape, but when you approach the table, you hear a knock on the door. The door open, and it reveal... Alternate's glowing face. Suddenly, Alternate enter into the room, push you against the wall, and slam his huge fat ass against your face, smothering you till you pass out soon... Actual scenario since 2024 (Took inspiration from the video)

ORIGINAL SCREENSHOT(VIDEO)

creator: GRIMKid 0
